variants: Tira Oulai graduated from Denim Ridge Academy, where she developed a keen interest in linguistics, ultimately achieving proficiency in the Thai script. In the realm of sports, she holds a Rune Skater Badge, recognizing her skill and dedication to rune skating. Tira also contributes to her community as a Safety Panelist at Mattockwood, focusing on crucial safety initiatives. Her scholarly works have been published by Havenstone Editions, a testament to her commitment to education and knowledge sharing. Combining her passion for language, sport, and community service, Tira exemplifies a well-rounded professional with diverse talents.
